description: Business Area Excel cell placeholders for HTML template generation and right-panel editor fields.

html.replacementMode: replace placeholders in HTML string using current CellValueMap

fields.label: Eco Solution / Main Headline
fields.initialValue: Life’s Good with Air Comfort Beyond Imagination

fields.label: Eco Solution / Main Body
fields.initialValue: We’re pioneering HVAC solutions in partnership with businesses around the world. We're creating healthier spaces for people, while being gentler on the planet. From homes and offices to factories and large-scale facilities. Our solutions are thoughtfully designed with care for every environment.

fields.label: Eco Solution / Accordion 01 / Headline
fields.initialValue: Air That Brings Value to Business

fields.label: Eco Solution / Accordion 01 / Body
fields.initialValue: We deliver HVAC solutions built for modern businesses - balancing performance, energy efficiency, and flexible control. From offices to retail and hospitality, we help create spaces that are healthier, more productive, and easier to manage.

fields.label: Eco Solution / Accordion 02 / Headline
fields.initialValue: Air, at a Temperature Fit for Life

fields.label: Eco Solution / Accordion 02 / Body
fields.initialValue: We design HVAC systems that make everyday living more comfortable, efficient, and quiet. With smart control, sleek design, and reliable performance, we help people create the perfect indoor environment - room by room.

fields.label: Eco Solution / Accordion 03 / Headline
fields.initialValue: Built to chill. Engineered to last.

fields.label: Eco Solution / Accordion 03 / Body
fields.initialValue: We provide powerful, scalable HVAC technologies tailored for complex industrial environments. With intelligent controls, energy optimization, and reliable performance, we help you maintain comfort, efficiency, and control - at any scale.

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Main Headline
fields.initialValue: Life’s Good with Intelligence in Every Drive

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Main Body
fields.initialValue: We create a seamlessly connected and expandable mobility experience. Our premium partnerships with the world’s leading carmakers enable this vision. Our solutions range from infotainment and displays to connectivity and software. We design smart technologies that enhance every moment in the cabin.

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Disclaimer
fields.initialValue: Images and videos are for illustrative purposes only and may not accurately reflect your actual experience.

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Accordion 01 / Body
fields.initialValue: We design head units that do more than connect - they think ahead. With intuitive controls, rich interfaces, and seamless integration, we deliver smarter, safer, more engaging driving experiences from the inside out.

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Accordion 02 / Body
fields.initialValue: We design vehicle displays that transform dashboards into intuitive, vivid interfaces. Whether it’s critical driving data or immersive entertainment, we make information clear, accessible, and beautifully integrated.

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Accordion 03 / Body
fields.initialValue: We deliver fast, secure, and intelligent connectivity that keeps mobility in sync with the world. From seamless communication to real-time updates, we enable smarter, more responsive driving experiences.

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Accordion 04 / Headline
fields.initialValue: With Your Safety and Convenience in Mind

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Accordion 04 / Body
fields.initialValue: We power advanced vision systems that recognize, react, and support safer driving. By turning visual data into real-time decisions, we give drivers confidence - and vehicles the awareness they need.

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Accordion 05 / Headline
fields.initialValue: Built to Think. Designed to Move.

fields.label: Vehicle Solution / Accordion 05 / Body
fields.initialValue: We develop flexible, scalable software platforms that support future mobility. From in-vehicle infotainment to real-time control systems, we help automakers innovate faster, smarter, and with greater freedom.

fields.label: Media Entertainment Solution / Main Headline
fields.initialValue: Life’s Good with Solutions Beyond Displays

fields.label: Media Entertainment Solution / Main Body
fields.initialValue: Our solutions seamlessly enable creativity, productivity, and connection. They’re powered by technology that quietly blends into the background. They unlock the potential of webOS and other future-ready platforms. Ultimately, LG Media entertainment solution is not just about displays. We’re building a foundation for tomorrow’s immersive experiences.

fields.label: Media Entertainment Solution / Accordion 01 / Body
fields.initialValue: We turn screens into experiences with displays that reveal, connect, and inspire. Whether it’s a lesson that sparks curiosity or data that drives decisions, our displays make every moment vivid, every message unforgettable, and every detail count.

fields.label: Media Entertainment Solution / Accordion 02 / Headline
fields.initialValue: See More. Share More. Achieve More.

fields.label: Media Entertainment Solution / Accordion 02 / Body
fields.initialValue: We empower professional clients to see more, share more, and achieve more. By delivering innovative IT solutions that leverage cutting-edge technologies, we enhance operational efficiency and drive business success.

fields.label: Home Appliance Solution / Main Headline
fields.initialValue: Life’s Good with Leading Solutions Built From Inside

fields.label: Home Appliance Solution / Main Body
fields.initialValue: We work closely with partners to lead in key technologies. We create longer-lasting experiences across multiple fields. From advanced materials to core components. Enhanced commercial laundry experiences. Residential spaces designed by professional builders. All this brings better living to a wide range of customers.

fields.label: Home Appliance Solution / Accordion 01 / Body
fields.initialValue:
We provide home builders with premium appliance packages that combine reliability, style, and innovation. From projects at scale to custom
homes, we make it easy to deliver modern living experiences - backed by LG’s trusted performance.

fields.label: Home Appliance Solution / Accordion 02 / Headline
fields.initialValue: The Next Materials for Better Living

fields.label: Home Appliance Solution / Accordion 02 / Body
fields.initialValue: We develop high-performance materials that unlock new potential across industries. From durability to sustainability, our solutions are engineered for next-gen design, performance, and efficiency.

fields.label: Home Appliance Solution / Accordion 03 / Body
fields.initialValue: We design the core components that make appliances smarter, stronger, and more efficient. From motors to compressors, our innovations work behind the scenes - so everyday life feels effortless on the outside.

fields.label: Home Appliance Solution / Accordion 04 / Headline
fields.initialValue: Laundry to the Next Level of Excellence

fields.label: Home Appliance Solution / Accordion 04 / Body
fields.initialValue: We create laundry solutions built for business - engineered for durability, efficiency, and ease of use. With smart controls and energy-saving performance, we help operators do more, spend less, and deliver better service every time.
